title: Device(headset) inventory details
scenario: Poly Lens app inventory section displays correct headset device details (model, serial number, last detected, software version) after login
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Lens app on the mobile device.
2. Log in to the Poly Lens app with valid credentials.
3. Navigate to the Inventory section from the Home screen or main menu.
4. Locate the connected headset device in the inventory list.
5. Tap on the connected headset device to view its details.
6. Observe the displayed device details: device model, serial number, last detected date/time, and software version.
expected: The device details screen displays the correct device model, serial number, last detected timestamp, and software version for the connected headset, matching the actual device information.
